allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP_CODE: %{http_code}\\nSIZE: %{size_download} bytes\\n' -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8' -H 'Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9' --max-time 25 https://camelcamelcamel.com/top_drops)

Bash(curl -s -D - -o /dev/null -w 'FINAL_HTTP: %{http_code}\\n' -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 25 https://camelcamelcamel.com/)
